message:
🐛 Auto-enable demo mode when agent is offline on localhost (#888)

When the agent is disconnected and we're not in cluster mode, automatically
enable demo mode so users see demo data instead of an empty "Offline" screen.

When the agent reconnects, auto-disable demo mode (only if it was auto-enabled,
not if the user manually toggled it on).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
